unit: one challenger argument to an OP
outcome: OP awarded a delta (real recorded persuasion outcome)

by_pair_backtest.note: graded on a held-out (by-pair) split of REAL outcomes. AUC 0.5 / pair_accuracy 0.5 = chance.

production_fit_grade.note: graded on a held-out split of the supplied reply outcomes

transport_assumption: persuasion (CMV delta) -> cold-email reply transport is an assumption; the grade applies to the fitted domain
